Class Clarification

java.lang.Object
model.Clarification
public class Clarification extends Object

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Clarification(int id, int questionId, int answerId, int authorId, int recipientId, String author, String content, LocalDateTime timestamp, boolean isRead, boolean isPublic)
    Constructs a Clarification using the provided timestamp exactly as given, typically used when rehydrating records from the database.
    Clarification(int id, int questionId, int authorId, int recipientId, String author, String content, LocalDateTime timestamp, Boolean isRead, Boolean isPublic)
    Constructs a Clarification without an answer ID, setting the timestamp to the current date and time.
    Clarification(int id, ContentType itemType, int contentId, int questionId, int answerId, int authorId, int recipientId, String author, String content, LocalDateTime timestamp, Boolean isRead, Boolean isPublic)
    Constructs a Clarification with a content type and content ID, setting the timestamp to the current date and time.

    Modifier and Type

    Description
    int
    getAnswerId()
    Returns the ID of the answer associated with this clarification, or 0 if the clarification targets a question directly.

    Returns the display name of the author of this clarification.

    Returns the ID of the user who authored this clarification.

    Returns the text body of this clarification.

    Returns the ID of the specific content item being clarified.

    Retrieves the display title of the content item this clarification targets by querying the database.

    Returns the unique ID of this clarification.

    Returns the ID of the question associated with this clarification.

    int

    Returns the ID of the user intended to receive this clarification.
    LocalDateTime
    getTimestamp()
    Returns the timestamp of when this clarification was created.
    boolean

    Returns whether this clarification is publicly visible to all users.
    boolean

    Returns whether this clarification has been read by the recipient.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Clarification

      public Clarification(int id, ContentType itemType, int contentId, int questionId, int answerId, int authorId, int recipientId, String author, String content, LocalDateTime timestamp, Boolean isRead, Boolean isPublic)
      Constructs a Clarification with a content type and content ID, setting the timestamp to the current date and time.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier for this clarification
      itemType - the type of content this clarification targets (e.g., QUESTION or ANSWER)
      contentId - the ID of the specific content item being clarified
      questionId - the ID of the associated question
      answerId - the ID of the associated answer, or 0 if not applicable
      authorId - the ID of the user who authored this clarification
      recipientId - the ID of the user intended to receive this clarification
      author - the display name of the author
      content - the text body of the clarification
      timestamp - ignored; the current time is used instead
      isRead - whether this clarification has been read by the recipient
      isPublic - whether this clarification is visible to all users

    • Clarification

      public Clarification(int id, int questionId, int answerId, int authorId, int recipientId, String author, String content, LocalDateTime timestamp, boolean isRead, boolean isPublic)
      Constructs a Clarification using the provided timestamp exactly as given, typically used when rehydrating records from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier for this clarification
      questionId - the ID of the associated question
      answerId - the ID of the associated answer, or 0 if not applicable
      authorId - the ID of the user who authored this clarification
      recipientId - the ID of the user intended to receive this clarification
      author - the display name of the author
      content - the text body of the clarification
      timestamp - the exact timestamp to assign to this clarification
      isRead - whether this clarification has been read by the recipient
      isPublic - whether this clarification is visible to all users

    • Clarification

      public Clarification(int id, int questionId, int authorId, int recipientId, String author, String content, LocalDateTime timestamp, Boolean isRead, Boolean isPublic)
      Constructs a Clarification without an answer ID, setting the timestamp to the current date and time.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier for this clarification
      questionId - the ID of the associated question
      authorId - the ID of the user who authored this clarification
      recipientId - the ID of the user intended to receive this clarification
      author - the display name of the author
      content - the text body of the clarification
      timestamp - ignored; the current time is used instead
      isRead - whether this clarification has been read by the recipient
      isPublic - whether this clarification is visible to all users

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns the unique ID of this clarification.
      Returns:
      the clarification ID

    • getItemType

      public ContentType getItemType()
      Returns the content type this clarification targets.
      Returns:
      the ContentType (e.g., QUESTION or ANSWER)

    • getContentId

      public int getContentId()
      Returns the ID of the specific content item being clarified.
      Returns:
      the content item ID

    • getQuestionId

      public int getQuestionId()
      Returns the ID of the question associated with this clarification.
      Returns:
      the question ID

    • getAnswerId

      public int getAnswerId()
      Returns the ID of the answer associated with this clarification, or 0 if the clarification targets a question directly.
      Returns:
      the answer ID

    • getAuthorId

      public int getAuthorId()
      Returns the ID of the user who authored this clarification.
      Returns:
      the author's user ID

    • getRecipientId

      public int getRecipientId()
      Returns the ID of the user intended to receive this clarification.
      Returns:
      the recipient's user ID

    • getAuthor

      public String getAuthor()
      Returns the display name of the author of this clarification.
      Returns:
      the author's name

    • getContent

      public String getContent()
      Returns the text body of this clarification.
      Returns:
      the clarification content

    • getTimestamp

      public LocalDateTime getTimestamp()
      Returns the timestamp of when this clarification was created.
      Returns:
      the creation timestamp as a LocalDateTime

    • isRead

      public boolean isRead()
      Returns whether this clarification has been read by the recipient.
      Returns:
      true if the clarification has been read; false otherwise

    • isPublic

      public boolean isPublic()
      Returns whether this clarification is publicly visible to all users.
      Returns:
      true if the clarification is public; false if private

    • setId

      public void setId(int id)
      Sets the unique ID of this clarification.
      Parameters:
      id - the new clarification ID

    • setItemType

      public void setItemType(ContentType itemType)
      Sets the content type this clarification targets.
      Parameters:
      itemType - the ContentType to assign

    • setContentId

      public void setContentId(int contentId)
      Sets the ID of the specific content item being clarified.
      Parameters:
      contentId - the content item ID to assign

    • setQuestionId

      public void setQuestionId(int questionId)
      Sets the ID of the question associated with this clarification.
      Parameters:
      questionId - the question ID to assign

    • setAnswerId

      public void setAnswerId(int answerId)
      Sets the ID of the answer associated with this clarification.
      Parameters:
      answerId - the answer ID to assign

    • setAuthorId

      public void setAuthorId(int authorId)
      Sets the ID of the user who authored this clarification.
      Parameters:
      authorId - the author's user ID to assign

    • setRecipientId

      public void setRecipientId(int recipientId)
      Sets the ID of the user intended to receive this clarification.
      Parameters:
      recipientId - the recipient's user ID to assign

    • setAuthor

      public void setAuthor(String author)
      Sets the display name of the author of this clarification.
      Parameters:
      author - the author name to assign

    • setContent

      public void setContent(String content)
      Sets the text body of this clarification.
      Parameters:
      content - the clarification content to assign

    • setTimestamp

      public void setTimestamp(String timestamp)
      Sets the timestamp of this clarification to the current date and time. The provided string parameter is not used.
      Parameters:
      timestamp - unused; the current time is always applied

    • setIsRead

      public void setIsRead(boolean read)
      Sets whether this clarification has been read by the recipient.
      Parameters:
      read - true to mark as read; false to mark as unread

    • setIsPublic

      public void setIsPublic(boolean isPublic)
      Sets whether this clarification is publicly visible to all users.
      Parameters:
      isPublic - true to make public; false to make private

    • getQuestionTitle

      public String getQuestionTitle()
      Returns the title of the question associated with this clarification. This is an extended field not set by the constructor.
      Returns:
      the question title, or null if not set

    • setQuestionTitle

      public void setQuestionTitle(String questionTitle)
      Sets the title of the question associated with this clarification.
      Parameters:
      questionTitle - the question title to assign

    • getContentTitle

      public String getContentTitle(DatabaseHelper db)
      Retrieves the display title of the content item this clarification targets by querying the database. For questions, returns the question title directly. For answers, returns a string in the format "Answer to: <question title>".
      Parameters:
      db - the DatabaseHelper used to look up content titles
      Returns:
      the display title of the targeted content, or an error string if lookup fails
